name: Sushant Lokhande
tagline: I'm a software engineer. I build full stack systems, end to end ML pipelines, and the backends that serve them. Lately I published a malware classification pipeline, wrote a vector search engine from scratch in C++, and an LLM gateway that runs on it.
cta: DM me to see what I'm working on now. Let's build something together.
about: I build software that feels fast and gets out of your way.

I just finished my Master's in Computer Science at San José State, where my thesis on spotting malware by turning it into images grew into a published paper. Lately I have been writing my own vector search engine in C++, building an LLM gateway on top of it, and shipping something small almost every day.

Before grad school I wrote Python microservices for an edtech platform used by around 70 thousand people. The part of engineering I love most is where a hard systems problem meets a clean, simple interface. Right now I am looking for full time software and ML roles in the Bay Area.
